meta.name: Shipyard QA Testing Site
meta.description: Internal testing site for Shipyard AI plugin development and QA
meta.author: Shipyard AI

content.headline: Shipyard QA Testing Environment
content.subheadline: This site is used by Margaret Hamilton and the QA team to test EmDash plugins, themes, and features before they ship to production.

content.headline: What we test here
content.subheadline: Every plugin goes through QA on this site before shipping.

features.title: MemberShip Plugin
features.description: Membership plans, gated content, Stripe Payment Links, member management.

features.title: EventDash Plugin
features.description: Events, ticketing, registration, calendar views, iCal export.

features.title: ReviewPulse Plugin
features.description: Google/Yelp review integration, display widgets, sentiment tracking.

features.title: FormForge Plugin
features.description: Form builder, submissions, spam protection, webhooks.

features.title: SEODash Plugin
features.description: Meta tags, sitemaps, social previews, readability analysis.

content.headline: Plugin Test Area
content.subheadline: Each plugin installs test content here. Use the admin panel to manage.

content.headline: Report Issues
content.subheadline: Found a bug? Create a GitHub issue at sethshoultes/shipyard-ai with the qa-fix label.
